sql_array: CREATE TABLE bpel_process (id INT PRIMARY KEY, process_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, bpel_content CLOB, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO bpel_process (id, process_name, bpel_content) VALUES (1, 'Echo', 'Contents of BPEL for Echo');
INSERT INTO bpel_process (id, process_name, bpel_content) VALUES (2, 'Test', 'Contents of BPEL for Test');
CREATE TABLE wsdl_files (process_id INT, wsdl_url VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (process_id) REFERENCES bpel_process(id));
CREATE PROCEDURE dynamic_import (url VARCHAR(255), process_name VARCHAR(255), OUT scp INT) AS BEGIN DECLARE script_return INT; script_return := BPEL.BPEL.import_script(url, process_name, scp); END;

SELECT process_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wsdl_files WHERE process_id = bpel_process.id) AS num_wsdl FROM bpel_process WHERE process_name = 'Echo' OR (bpel_content IS NOT NULL AND bpel_content <> '') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM wsdl_files WHERE process_id = bpel_process.id) ORDER BY num_wsdl DESC;

SELECT id, process_name FROM bpel_process WHERE id = 1 OR EXISTS (SELECT * FROM wsdl_files WHERE process_id = bpel_process.id HAVING COUNT(wsdl_url) > 0) AND NOT (bpel_content IS NULL) AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bpel_process WHERE (bpel_content IS NOT NULL OR process_name IS NOT NULL) AND updated_at BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND NOW();
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temporary_wsdl CASCADE;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temporary_wsdl AS SELECT * FROM wsdl_files WHERE wsdl_url LIKE 'file:/echo/%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temporary_wsdl WHERE process_id IN (SELECT id FROM bpel_process WHERE process_name = 'Echo' OR process_name = 'Test');
